pulseSummary.summary:
SUPRA PULSE
Independent Project Analysis
Supra Vault 95
Symbol: $SVLT
Date: January 1, 2026
Tier: SPOTLIGHT
SPOTLIGHT • CERTIFIED • DEFI • LIVE
Score Breakdown
Transparency 14 / 15
• documentation: 4/5
Clear white paper, detailed tokenomics.
• contract Visibility: 5/5
All smart contract are verified and public to the block chain.
• team Disclosure: 5/5
Core team and advisors are visible.
Token Distribution 15 / 15
• supply Structure: 5/5
Total supply fixed, fair distribution among holders.
• concentration: 5/5
Top 3 wallet control 40% of the supply.
• vesting Schedule: 5/5
Fair launch.
Liquidity Status 14 / 15
• liquidity Presence: 4/5
Listed on three major DeXes with active trading.
• lock Status: 5/5
Liquidity fully locked.
• depth: 5/5
Moderate.
Delivery / Activity 13 / 15
 Risk Observations 15 / 15
• security Audit: 5/5
15/100
• centralized Risks: 5/5
The risk of centralization of the token is minimal.
• historical Issues: 5/5
No major hack/rug or incidents report. As the the last report from solid proof.
Disclaimer
This report is provided for informational and analytical purposes only. It does not constitute financial advice, endorsement, or
recommendation. Readers are responsible for conducting their own independent research.
